warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
3min easy Row
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10 Jump Squat
10 Wall Ball
gymnastics:
Wall Ball: In pairs
3 attempts. with approx 3 mins between
e.g.
Min 1 A goes, B refs
Min 2 A continues/Rest
Min 3 B goes, A refs
Min 4 B continues/Rest

hypertrophy.reasoning: Wall balls heavily tax quads, chest, and shoulders; accessory work targets opposing/stabilizer muscles to build resilience.

raw_text:
Warm-up | Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
3min easy Row
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10 Jump Squat
10 Wall Ball
500m Row | Max Effort 500m Row
Wall Ball | Max Unboken Wall Ball
Hip crease below top of the knee
Ball above the bottom of the line for ladies, above the line for men
If you get no repped, keep going but don't count the rep | In pairs
3 attempts. with approx 3 mins between
e.g.
Min 1 A goes, B refs
Min 2 A continues/Rest
Min 3 B goes, A refs
Min 4 B continues/Rest
siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Gymnastics: Wall Ball: In pairs. Metcon: 5-10min Rest. Workout. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, back/lats, biceps.
